storyHook: 一家人吃饭，聊今天的事

narrative.when: 周日晚上七点，一周难得的全家聚餐
narrative.who: 甲（儿子/女儿）· 乙（母亲）· 偶尔提到父亲和弟弟
narrative.how: 边吃边聊，气氛随意放松
narrative.method: 问近况、分享当天的事、商量周末安排、收拾碗筷
narrative.event: 甲这周要出差，想趁晚饭把家里的事安排好

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am back! It smells good.
turns.zh: 我回来了！好香啊。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Take a seat, love. The soup is warm.
turns.zh: 快坐下，宝贝。汤还热着呢。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Long day. The work is done.
turns.zh: 今天真长。活干完了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well done. Have some greens.
turns.zh: 干得好。吃点青菜。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thanks, Mother. I am away from the first day of the week for three days.
turns.zh: 谢谢妈。我从一周的第一天起出门三天。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh? Where to?
turns.zh: 哦？去哪儿？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: A town in the north. Work business.
turns.zh: 北部的一个城镇。工作的事。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It's cold up north. Take a thick coat.
turns.zh: 那边冷。带件厚外套。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put the water pipe right before I go.
turns.zh: 好的。走之前我把水管弄好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let that be for now. Get your food down.
turns.zh: 现在别管那个。先把饭吃了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The pipe is making a sound again.
turns.zh: 水管又在响了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will see to it after the meal. First, your food.
turns.zh: 吃完饭我来弄。先吃你的饭。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: How did the test go today?
turns.zh: 今天考得怎么样？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Not so good. The numbers were hard.
turns.zh: 不太好。数字太难了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: We will go over it at the end of the week. I will give you a hand.
turns.zh: 周末我们一起复习。我帮你。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is kind of you. Your brother needs help with his numbers.
turns.zh: 你真好。你弟弟数学需要帮忙。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see. I will see him before I go.
turns.zh: 我知道。走之前我会见他。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let us get some things from the store on the third day of the week in the morning.
turns.zh: 我们周三早上从商店买点东西吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good idea. I will make a list after the meal.
turns.zh: 好主意。吃完饭我列个单子。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Any special needs for the work food?
turns.zh: 出差吃的有什么特别要求吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Not at all. Keep it simple. No sharp bits.
turns.zh: 没什么。简单点就行。别太辣。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I will get some soft bread and cheese for you.
turns.zh: 好。我给你买点软面包和奶酪。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That sounds good. And some fruit too, if it's not dear.
turns.zh: 听起来不错。再买点水果，如果不贵的话。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I saw apples at a good price today.
turns.zh: 行。今天我看到苹果价格不错。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. I am ready. Thanks, Mother.
turns.zh: 好的。我准备好了。谢谢妈妈。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Have more. You look thin.
turns.zh: 多吃点，你看你瘦的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am well, Mother. I had much work today.
turns.zh: 我没事，妈。今天工作多了点。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Did you get the last bit done?
turns.zh: 最后那部分搞定了吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, all done. The group was happy.
turns.zh: 搞定了，大家挺满意的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Your father said the water pipe is still letting water drop.
turns.zh: 那就好。你爸说水管还在滴水。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put it right before I go. Do not be troubled.
turns.zh: 我走之前修好，别担心。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: And your brother? How was his test?
turns.zh: 你弟呢？考试怎么样？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: He said numbers are hard. I will give him a hand on the rest day.
turns.zh: 他说数学难。休息日我帮他看看。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is kind. He will be pleased.
turns.zh: 那敢情好，他肯定高兴。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Would we get some more soup?
turns.zh: 要不要再来点汤？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: There is some left. Here, take more meat as well.
turns.zh: 还有，来，再夹点肉。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thanks, Mother. This is my last night meal before the journey.
turns.zh: 谢谢妈。这趟出差前最后一顿晚饭了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then we will have a good meal on day four. Little bags of meat and greens.
turns.zh: 那周四给你包顿好的，饺子。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That sounds great. I will get the things for the inside.
turns.zh: 太棒了，里面的东西我来准备。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No need. I will do it. You just rest and get your things together.
turns.zh: 不用，你只管收拾行李，我来弄。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will get the water pipe fixed before I go.
turns.zh: 我走之前把水龙头修好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do not trouble. Your father will do it.
turns.zh: 别操心了，让你爸弄。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No, I said I would do it. It will only take a short time.
turns.zh: 不，我说了要修，很快就好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well then, if you are certain. I will get the things for you.
turns.zh: 行，你要是坚持，我给你拿东西。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thank you. And on the day off, may we go to the food store?
turns.zh: 谢谢。那休息日咱们去食品店？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, we need milk, bread, and some greens.
turns.zh: 好，要买牛奶、面包和青菜。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will make a list. Also, get some fruit for the journey.
turns.zh: 我列个单子。再买点水果路上吃。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good idea. I will put in some apples and oranges.
turns.zh: 好主意，我放几个苹果和橘子。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: And for the little brother, a sweet thing from the new town.
turns.zh: 对了，给弟弟带点那边的点心。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: He will be happy. You are a good brother.
turns.zh: 他肯定高兴。你真是个好哥哥。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: So, how was your day at work?
turns.zh: 今天上班怎么样？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. We are done with the work. No more late nights.
turns.zh: 挺好，工作收尾了，不用再熬夜了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is a weight off your mind. Have some more meat.
turns.zh: 那就轻松了。再吃点肉。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thanks, mother. But I have news. I have to go away for work the week after this one.
turns.zh: 谢谢妈。不过有个事，我下周要出差。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh? For how long?
turns.zh: 哦？去几天？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Three days. From day five to day one.
turns.zh: 三天。从第五天到第一天。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Then we will get your things ready. Do you have a warm coat?
turns.zh: 那得赶紧收拾行李。你有厚外套吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, I will take it. The weather there is cold, Father said.
turns.zh: 有的，我带上。爸说那边冷。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: He is right. I will put some tea bags in your bag.
turns.zh: 没错。我给你包里放点茶包。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are the best. How did the boy do in his test?
turns.zh: 妈最好了。弟弟考试怎么样？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: He said the test on numbers was hard.
turns.zh: 他说数字考试很难。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I saw him working on it all week.
turns.zh: 我看他忙了一整周。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: He is not good with numbers, is he?
turns.zh: 他是不是不太擅长数字？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Not quite. But he does his best.
turns.zh: 确实不太行。不过他挺努力的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I may give him a hand on the last day of the week.
turns.zh: 我可以在周末最后一天帮他一把。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That would be great. He needs a push.
turns.zh: 那太好了。他需要人推一把。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put the juice right before I go.
turns.zh: 我走前会把水龙头弄好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The one in the cooking room? It is still dropping water.
turns.zh: 厨房那个吗？还在滴水呢。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. I have it in my room.
turns.zh: 对。我房间里有它。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Then we can take the family to the store on the day of rest.
turns.zh: 好。那周日咱们全家去超市。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us go in the morning?
turns.zh: 咱们上午去？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, before the others come.
turns.zh: 嗯，赶在别人之前。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will make a list tonight.
turns.zh: 我今晚列个单子。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Get some meat for the cold days.
turns.zh: 买点肉，天冷好存。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: And some greens for the soup.
turns.zh: 再买点青菜煮汤。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You and your greens. Right.
turns.zh: 就你爱青菜。行。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What about the fish? Is it good here?
turns.zh: 鱼呢？这儿的鱼新鲜吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The man at the turn has good fish.
turns.zh: 街角那家鱼不错。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Then we go there first.
turns.zh: 那咱们先去那儿。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I will get my coat ready.
turns.zh: 好。我把外套准备好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will get the list from my bag.
turns.zh: 我去包里拿单子。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No need. I have it here, on the table.
turns.zh: 不用，我放桌上了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh, good. Then we are ready.
turns.zh: 哦，那行。都准备好了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Almost. Your father said he would come too.
turns.zh: 差不多。你爸说他也去。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Father? That is new. He does not come to the market.
turns.zh: 我爸？稀罕。他从来不去菜场。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: He would like some strong tea from that old place.
turns.zh: 他想从那个老店买点浓茶。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Ah, that place. I will take him there.
turns.zh: 哦，那家店。我带他去。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Then I can get more things without his waiting.
turns.zh: 好。那我就能多买点，不用他等着。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You two are together. I am only the helper.
turns.zh: 你俩是一伙的。我就是个帮手。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: A good helper. Now, take your greens.
turns.zh: 好帮手。来，把青菜吃了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will have these greens. But I have a question.
turns.zh: 我把青菜吃完。但我有个问题。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Go on. What is it?
turns.zh: 说吧。什么事？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I go after the middle-day meal on day five, back on day one.
turns.zh: 我周五午饭后走，周一回来。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. On the night before you go, we make balls of paste for you.
turns.zh: 对。你走的前一晚我们包饺子给你饯行。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That sounds good. And I will put the water pipe right before I go.
turns.zh: 听着不错。我走之前把水管弄好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No need for trouble. Your father will do it.
turns.zh: 别麻烦了。你爸能修。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I said I would. It is not a great thing.
turns.zh: 我说了要修。不是什么大事。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well, if you say so. But do not work too hard.
turns.zh: 行，你说了算。但别太累。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will not. Let me take these plates to the water drain.
turns.zh: 不会的。我把盘子端到水槽去。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good boy. I will clean the table.
turns.zh: 好孩子。我来擦桌子。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The water pipe is making a sound again. I will look at it tomorrow.
turns.zh: 水管又在响了。我明天看看。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You have a long day tomorrow. Rest first.
turns.zh: 你明天要赶路，先休息吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am not tired. I will put the food in boxes first.
turns.zh: 我不累。先把剩菜装盒。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here is a bag of fruit for your way. Take it.
turns.zh: 这袋水果你路上吃。拿着。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thank you, mother. You are kind.
turns.zh: 谢谢妈。你真好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Go to bed now. rest up.
turns.zh: 快去睡吧。好好休息。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: rest up, Mother. okay in the morning.
turns.zh: 好好休息，妈妈。明早见。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good night, son. Sleep well.
turns.zh: 晚安，儿子。睡个好觉。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You too, Mother. I will put the pipe right before I go.
turns.zh: 您也是，妈。我走之前把水管修好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do not be troubled. Your father will do it.
turns.zh: 别费心了。你爸能修。

storyBlurb: 周日傍晚，一家人围坐饭桌，热菜冒着白气。甲要出差，趁晚饭把家里的事安排好。
storyScript:
【开场·回家团聚】周日晚七点，厨房的暖光混着菜香漫进客厅。甲推开家门，母亲乙正把最后一道汤端上桌，父亲和弟弟已经坐好。甲放下包，在熟悉的位置坐下，碗筷碰撞声里，一周的疲惫渐渐散开。

【进行·边吃边聊】乙夹了一筷子菜到甲碗里，问起这周的工作。甲说起今天项目收尾顺利，又提到下周要出差三天。乙的手顿了顿，随即说那得提前准备行李。弟弟插嘴问出差去哪个城市，甲笑着答了个地名，父亲点点头，说那边冷，多带件外套。话题转到弟弟的考试，他抱怨数学太难，乙说周末可以一起复习。甲心里盘算着出差前要帮家里修好水龙头，周末带父母去超市采购。

【进行·商量周末安排】甲咽下一口饭，说这周五下午走，下周一回来。乙立刻说那周四晚上包饺子，给甲饯行。父亲问周末要不要去钓鱼，甲说这次赶不上，下次一定陪。弟弟嚷着要甲带特产，甲答应给他带当地的点心。汤碗见底时，甲起身去盛饭，乙已经接过碗，又添了满满一碗。

【收束·收拾餐桌】饭后，甲帮着收拾碗筷，乙擦桌子，父亲和弟弟去客厅看电视。水龙头滴答响着，甲说明天就修。乙说别太累，甲应着，把剩菜用保鲜膜封好。九点，甲回房整理行李，路过客厅时，乙递来一袋水果，说路上吃。互道晚安后，甲关上门，窗外夜色沉静，心里却暖融融的。
